# Workspace Instructions

- After every repository change, review README.md and TROUBLESHOOT.md before finishing the task.
- Update README.md to reflect any changes to setup, usage, module layout, workflows, commands, or behavior introduced by the task.
- Update TROUBLESHOOT.md to reflect any new failure modes, fixes, caveats, or operational guidance introduced by the task.
- If a change does not require edits to one or both files, explicitly verify they still match the current repository state instead of skipping documentation review.
